title: CHILDREN'S PRODUCT SAFETY ACT
doc_html:
CHAPTER 55.  CHILDREN'S PRODUCT SAFETY ACT

§2701.  Short title

This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Children's Product Safety Act".

Acts 2001, No. 1164, §1.
